---
title: "AOR Aggregation"
format: html
editor: visual
---
```{r}
# libraries
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(lubridate)
library(sf)
```

Loading in cleaned ICE encounters dataset 
```{r}
ice <- read_csv('ice_encounters_cleaned.csv')
```

Loading in shapefile with at county level
```{r}
aors_counties <- st_read('aors_counties/aors_counties.shp')
```
Loading in csv that has info on native/foreign born populations by county
```{r}
nat_cit <- read_csv('nat_cit_cleaned.csv')
colnames(nat_cit)
```
```{r}


```
